Bash(awk -F'[,:]' '{run+=$2; fail+=$4; err+=$6; skip+=$8} END {print "Run:", run, "Failures:", fail, "Errors:", err, "Skipped:", skip, "Passing:", run-fail-err-skip}')
Bash(awk -F'[,:]' '{run+=$2; fail+=$4; err+=$6; skip+=$8} END {print "Total run:", run, "Failures:", fail, "Errors:", err, "Skipped:", skip, "Passing:", run-fail-err-skip}')

Bash(awk '-F[,: ]' 'BEGIN{run=0; fail=0; err=0; skip=0} {for\(i=1;i<=NF;i++\) {if\($i=="run:"\) run+=$\(i+1\); if\($i=="Failures:"\) fail+=$\(i+1\); if\($i=="Errors:"\) err+=$\(i+1\); if\($i=="Skipped:"\) skip+=$\(i+1\)}} END {print "Total Tests:", run, "Passing:", run-fail-err-skip, "Skipped:", skip}')

Bash(awk '-F[,: ]' 'BEGIN{run=0; fail=0; err=0; skip=0} {for\(i=1;i<=NF;i++\) {if\($i=="run:"\) run+=$\(i+1\); if\($i=="Failures:"\) fail+=$\(i+1\); if\($i=="Errors:"\) err+=$\(i+1\); if\($i=="Skipped:"\) skip+=$\(i+1\)}} END {print "Total:", run, "Failures:", fail, "Errors:", err, "Skipped:", skip, "Passing:", run-fail-err-skip}')
Bash(awk -F'[:,]' '{gsub\(/ /, "", $2\); sum += $2} END {print "Total INFO-level tests:", sum}')
Bash(awk -F'[:,]' '{gsub\(/ /, "", $2\); sum += $2} END {print "Total WARNING-level tests:", sum}')
Bash(awk -F'[,:]' '{tests+=$2; fail+=$4; err+=$6} END {print "Total tests:", tests, "Failures:", fail, "Errors:", err}')
Bash(awk -F'[,: ]+' '{t+=$5; f+=$8; e+=$11} END {print "Total:", t, "Failures:", f, "Errors:", e, "Passing:", t-f-e}')
